name: raycast-agents
title: Agents
description: Add AI capabilities by connecting APIs and local data sources
author: pa1ar

commands.name: add-capability
commands.title: Add Capability
commands.description: Add a new API or data source capability

commands.name: manage-capabilities
commands.title: Manage Capabilities
commands.description: List, edit, and remove installed capabilities

preferences.name: anthropicApiKey
preferences.title: Anthropic API Key
preferences.description: Your Anthropic API key for scaffolding new capabilities

tools.name: list-capabilities
tools.title: List Capabilities
tools.description: List installed capabilities (name + description only). Always call this first, then get-capability-guide before making API calls.

tools.name: get-capability-guide
tools.title: Get Capability Guide
tools.description: Load the full API documentation (endpoints, auth, examples) for a capability. Call this after list-capabilities and before calling the API.

tools.name: call-capability
tools.title: Call Capability
tools.description: Make an authenticated API request to a capability. Always call get-capability-guide first to get endpoint documentation.
